testcase.name: test_dashboard_custom_period_support

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration_58.py:22: in auth_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
